verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_2: I do not worship what you worship.
verse.verse_3: Nor are you worshippers of what I worship.
verse.verse_4: Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship.
verse.verse_5: Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship.
verse.verse_6: For you is your religion, and for me is my religion."
